moments.title: World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is reaching its climax, with Quarter-finals on July 10-12, Semi-finals on July 15-16, and the Final on July 19th.

angles.name: Quarter-Finals Weekend
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages kick off with the Quarter-finals this weekend (July 10-12)! Who are you backing to make the semis?

angles.name: Semi-Finals Approaching
angles.copy: Next week, it's the World Cup Semi-finals (July 15-16)! The tension is building as teams fight for a spot in the final.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final on July 19th! Who do you predict will lift the trophy?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Day
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart receives its weekly update tomorrow, July 11th, revealing new entries and potential chart-toppers.

angles.name: Chart Friday
angles.copy: It's Official Chart Update day tomorrow (July 11)! Who do you think will be crowned the new UK number one?

angles.name: Predict the Top 3
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official Singles Chart! Who's in your Top 3 predictions for tomorrow's update?

moments.title: Courtney Love's Birthday
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, the outspoken frontwoman of Hole and a grunge icon, celebrates her 62nd birthday today, July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love! A true force in rock music. What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the 62nd birthday of a 90s legend, Courtney Love! From Hole to Hollywood, she's always been iconic.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's Birthday
moments.blurb: Folk-pop singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka', turns 67 on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Folk-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Saturday! 'Luka' is still a classic.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Her voice is unmistakable. Happy 67th birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega this weekend! What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn's Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, the influential co-founder and frontman of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on Monday, July 13th.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to The Byrds' own Roger McGuinn on Monday! A true pioneer of folk-rock. What's your favourite Byrds track?

angles.name: Rickenbacker Master
angles.copy: The man behind that iconic 12-string Rickenbacker sound, Roger McGuinn, turns 84 on July 13th! A true music legend.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, a versatile artist across rock, folk, and country, will be 80 on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: First Lady of Rock
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 80th birthday to the incomparable Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Her voice is pure magic.

angles.name: Genre-Crossing Icon
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt mastered every genre. Happy 80th birthday to a true music icon this July 15th!

moments.title: Marky Ramone's Birthday
moments.blurb: Marky Ramone, the longest-serving drummer for punk rock legends The Ramones, turns 74 on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Punk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Hey ho, let's go! Happy 74th Birthday to Marky Ramone on Wednesday! The legendary drummer of The Ramones.

angles.name: Ramones Beat
angles.copy: The driving force behind so many punk anthems, Marky Ramone celebrates his 74th birthday on July 15th!

moments.title: Geezer Butler's Birthday
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath's iconic bassist and primary lyricist Geezer Butler will celebrate his 77th birthday on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler, this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

angles.name: Sabbath Lyricist
angles.copy: The man behind so many classic Black Sabbath lyrics, Geezer Butler, turns 77 on July 17th!

moments.title: M.I.A.'s Birthday
moments.blurb: British artist M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), known for her genre-bending music and activism, celebrates her 51st birthday on Saturday, July 18th.

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the innovative M.I.A. this Saturday! From 'Paper Planes' to global activist, she's a true original.

angles.name: Dance Floor Filler
angles.copy: Get ready to move! Wishing a fantastic 51st birthday to M.I.A. on July 18th. Which of her tracks gets you dancing?

moments.title: Brian May's Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, the legendary lead guitarist of Queen and an astrophysicist, turns 79 on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Queen Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May this Sunday! The iconic guitarist of Queen. What's his greatest solo?

angles.name: Rock & Science Icon
angles.copy: From stadium rock to astrophysics, Brian May is a true polymath. Wishing Queen's legendary guitarist a very happy 79th birthday on July 19th!
